ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 🔹 Bean Query Command
ast.target: 🔹 Bean 查询命令

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Executes BQL queries against your Beancount file. Common values: bean-query, wsl bean-query, or python3 -m beancount.query
ast.target: 对您的 Beancount 文件执行 BQL 查询。常用值：bean-query、\n\t\t\t\t\t\twsl bean-query 或\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpython3 -m beancount.query

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 💹 Bean Price Command optional
ast.target: 💹 Bean 价格命令 可选

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Configure your Beancount file path and connection settings. The plugin will automatically detect your Python environment and test the connection.
ast.target:
\n

配置您的 Beancount 文件路径和连接设置。插件将自动检测您的 Python 环境并测试连接。

\n

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Commodities without price data are excluded from totals
ast.target: 没有价格数据的商品将不计入总额

ast.name: innerHTML
innerHTML
ast.target: 正在加载商品数据...

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
• • Commodity declarations (e.g., 2024-01-01 commodity BTC)
  • • With metadata for price sources (e.g., price: "USD")
  • • Or other metadata like exchange symbols
ast.target:
• • 商品声明（例如 2024-01-01 commodity BTC）
  • • 包含价格来源的元数据（例如 price: "USD"）
  • • 或其他元数据，如交易所代码

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: 格式：提供商/代码 \\u2014 例如 yahoo/AAPL\n\t\t\t\t\t\t或 crypto:coingecko/bitcoin

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: 价格来源 （可选）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The currency to use for transaction defaults and for consolidating totals (e.g., USD, INR).
ast.target: 用于交易默认值和汇总总额的货币（例如，USD、INR）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to the console.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically fetch commodity prices at scheduled intervals using bean-price.
ast.target: 使用 bean-price 按计划时间间隔自动获取商品价格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to automatically fetch prices for all commodities with configured price sources.
ast.target: 自动获取所有已配置价格来源的商品价格的频率。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display refresh, copy, and download buttons above BQL query results.
ast.target: 在 BQL 查询结果上方显示刷新、复制和下载按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the BQL query text above the results in a collapsible section.
ast.target: 在可折叠部分中于结果上方显示 BQL 查询文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show context-aware completions in .beancount files: account names, payees, narrations, currencies/commodities, tags (#), and links (^). Reopen the file to apply changes.
ast.target: 在 .beancount 文件中显示上下文感知的自动补全：账户名称、付款人、叙述、货币/商品、标签 (#) 和链接 (^)。重新打开文件以应用更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically format the Beancount file when saving: normalises indentation to 2 spaces, right-aligns amounts, and fixes @ price annotation spacing. Off by default.
ast.target: 保存时自动格式化 Beancount 文件：将缩进标准化为 2 个空格，右对齐金额，并修正 @ 价格注释的间距。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show Beancount validation errors as inline squiggly underlines using the existing bean-query connection. Reopen the file to apply changes.
ast.target: 使用现有的 bean-query 连接，将 Beancount 验证错误显示为内联波浪下划线。重新打开文件以应用更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of journal entries to load at once.
ast.target: 一次加载的最大日记账条目数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create timestamped backup files before modifying your Beancount file. Highly recommended for data safety.
ast.target: 在修改 Beancount 文件前创建带时间戳的备份文件。强烈建议用于数据安全。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of backup files to keep (oldest are deleted automatically). Set to 0 for unlimited backups.
ast.target: 保留的最大备份数量（最旧的文件会自动删除）。设置为 0 表示无限备份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the folder containing your structured Beancount files.
ast.target: 包含结构化 Beancount 文件的文件夹名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable detailed logging to the developer console for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用开发者控制台的详细日志记录以进行故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the full account name (e.g., Assets:Bank:Checking)
ast.target: 输入完整的账户名称（例如，Assets:Bank:Checking）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the date in YYYY-MM-DD format
ast.target: 以 YYYY-MM-DD 格式输入日期

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 可选：输入逗号分隔的货币（例如，USD,EUR）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose from existing .beancount files in your vault
ast.target: 从您的保险库中选择现有的 .beancount 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to your .beancount file (if outside vault)
ast.target: 您的 .beancount 文件的绝对路径（如果位于保险库外）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 您的 .beancount 文件的绝对路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the folder where your organized finance files will be stored
ast.target: 用于存储您组织好的财务文件的文件夹名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The main currency for your financial records (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)
ast.target: 您财务记录的主要货币（例如，USD、EUR、GBP）

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Update the operating_currency option in your ledger.beancount file

ast.target: 未配置或未找到 bean-price 命令。请安装 bean-price (pip install beanprice) 并在设置中配置。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid characters in price metadata. Price metadata must only contain alphanumeric characters, underscores, hyphens, slashes, dots, and colons.
ast.target: 价格元数据中包含无效字符。价格元数据只能包含字母数字字符、下划线、连字符、斜杠、点和冒号。

ast.target: 价格来源验证在 10 秒后超时。

ast.name: error

ast.target: 指标数据不完整——请检查 events.beancount 中的事件指令。

ast.target: 插件设置中未设置记账货币。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your finances are organized using a structured folder layout with separate files for accounts, transactions, prices, and more.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bean Query (pip install beanquery — separate package)
ast.target: Bean Query (pip install beanquery — 独立包)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose your starting point. A structured folder layout will be created to organize your finances.
ast.target: 选择您的起点。将创建一个结构化的文件夹布局来组织您的财务。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Perfect for testing! We'll create sample accounts and transactions so you can explore the plugin features immediately.
ast.target: 非常适合测试！我们将创建示例账户和交易，以便您立即探索插件功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Already have a Beancount file? Point us to it.
ast.target: 已有 Beancount 文件？请指向它。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在保险库中未找到 .beancount 文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Beancount for Obsidian is now configured and ready to use!
ast.target: Beancount for Obsidian 现已配置完成，可以使用了！

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open the Finance Dashboard (Command Palette → "Open Finance Dashboard")
ast.target: 打开财务仪表板（命令面板 → \"打开财务仪表板\"）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Explore the 5 tabs: Overview, Transactions, Journal, Balance Sheet, Commodities
ast.target: 探索 5 个标签页：概览、交易、日记、资产负债表、商品

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try BQL queries in markdown notes with code blocks
ast.target: 在带有代码块的 Markdown 笔记中尝试 BQL 查询

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable Automatic Price Fetching in Settings → General to keep commodity prices up to date
ast.target: 在设置 → 常规中启用自动价格获取，以保持商品价格最新
